title: Callista anosma
taxonomy: Callista anosma is classified within the phylum Mollusca and the class Gastropoda, specifically in the family Calliostomatidae. It belongs to the genus Callista. Further classification places it within the order Trochida and the subclass Vetigastropoda. The classification is based on the anatomical characteristics of the snail, including its shell and internal structure. Callista anosma is a type of sea snail commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions.
